name: Kuze Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuze Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the food wholesale business for food service industries in Japan and internationally. It offers commercial ingredients and materials, such as Italian mix, grated radishes, smoked salmon slice, scrambled eggs, sauces, pork cutlets, kinpira burdock, potato salad, pate de campagne, beef steak slice, beef burger patty, beef hamburger, radish and bamboo shoots, boiled radish and carrot soup stock, extra virgin olive oil, tempura powder, hakata mentaiko barako, sauce fried noodles, fried chicken thighs, wheat scented baguette, shredded cheese, rich white miso, non-oil dressing Japanese style ginger, and grated onion dressing under the Kuze brand. The company also provides chiffon cakes, pound chocolate, danju, shortcakes, mousses, cakes, sponge sheets, base creams, and whipping creams under the Dolceze brand name; and commercial wraps, paper towels, chooking sheets and papers, aluminum foil, alcohol preparation spray bottle, neutral detergent, sterilizer / bleach, liquid detergent, dishwasher rinse, and hand wash. It distributes its products to hotels, halls, restaurants, taverns, fast foods restaurants, catering, delicatessens and prepared dishes, and inflight meal services. In addition, it proposes menus and offers products through catalog-sales system. The company was founded in 1934 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
